{# Adapted from - djangoproject.com/docs/templates/docs/py-modindex.html - sphinx/themes/basic/domainindex.html #} {% extends "layout.html" %} {% if pagename == "py-modindex" %} {% set title = _("Module Index | Django Documentation") %} {% set page_title = _("Module Index") %} {% else %} {# Some other domain index. (Probably unused in Django.) #} {% set title -%} {% trans indextitle=indextitle %}{{ indextitle }} | Django Documentation{% endtrans %} {%- endset %} {% set page_title = indextitle %} {% endif %} {% block toc_wrapper %}{% endblock %} {% block current_page_title %}{{ page_title }}{% endblock %} {% block body_wrap %}

{{ page_title }}

    {% for letter, _ in content %} {{ letter }}{% if not loop.last %} | {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% for letter, objects in content %}

{{ letter|upper }}

    {%- for module_name, subtype, docname, path, platforms, qualifier, synopsis in objects %} {%- if docname %}
  • {{ module_name }} {%- if synopsis %}
    {{ synopsis }}     {%- endif %}
    • {%- endif %} {%- endfor %}
{%- endfor %} {% endblock body_wrap %}
